text:
At 10 Mar 2001 15:50:09 GMT,
mdharnois@home.com wrote:
> vmware2 will not run on current. a popup window states "Could not open
> Please make sure that the kernel module 'vmmon' is loaded. (/dev/vmmon).
> Module 5 power on failed.

I think kernel module should sync with kernel.  I'm afraid you did not
update vmware2 and rtc ports after new kernel installation.

Can you check clean environment?
